content.full_text:
Offices of Gary H. Werner
22861 Ironbark Drive
Diamond Bar, CA 91765
(714) 860-1757

February 25, 1991

Mr. Mark Morodomi
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807

Dear Mr. Morodomi:

In follow-up to our telephone conversation of February 22, 1991 I am providing this written request and ask for your written response:

In April, 1990 I was re-elected to the Diamond Bar City Council for a four year term. Upon re-election, the City Council elected me to serve as Mayor. I receive $500/month from the City of Diamond Bar for my City Council position.

In December, 1990 I accepted the appointed position "Field Representative" for Assemblyman Paul V. Horcher (52nd District, which includes Diamond Bar). I receive $500/month from the State of California.

I have continued in my seventeen year city planning consulting business and frequently I am retained by local cities as a consultant. As of December, 1990 I have been retained by the City of La Habra Heights in the capacity as contract consulting "planning director". I receive a monthly income from the City of La Habra Heights.

Q. Can you identify a "conflict of interest" inherent in my serving in these positions?

If you are in need of additional information do not hesitate to call. Your response will be greatly appreciated. Please send your response to my home address as indicated above.

Sincerely,

[Signature]
Gary H. Werner
